text:
As the sound of lightning echoes through the sky. An uneasy sensation starts to weigh upon you.
The air is tense, soaking wet. Rain pours upon your entire body like if you were dropped into the middle of the amazon rain forest. In the midst of this ferocious storm, capable of topping over cities, you find yourself face to face with another pirate.

This pirate is none other than Captain Kracker! This demon has devastated countless ships and has invaded multiple defenceless islands. He rules over the seven seas with an iron fist.
He's a savage, inhuminalane and cruel beast!
But his cruelest act of all, an act so vile it makes your guts rearrange themselves into a pretzel knot...
He called you a mean name!

You, on the other hand, stand for everything that is good. Taking down ruthless pirates and sirens and sea monsters and krakens and sirens and wait you already said that and uh other beasts to help and protect the people you love. With a swachbuckling sword in hand and your canons filled to the brim with steel balls of pure explosive power, this heroism is what you strive for.
Seeing your efforts come to fruition and watching the change in the lives of the people you've saved is all you need in this world to make yourself feel complete.
And you've sworn to yourself that no matter what happens. This treacherous beast will finally be slain!
Because you are,
The one,
The only,
CAPTAIN PAVO-
 
Captain Kracker : OI!

Captain Kracker : Ya gonna make a move or are ya just gonna spend our dirt rollin time monologuin to yeself Captain Twinkle Twink!
Captain Pavo : Well excuse me, I was in the middle of an exceptional and expository- wait, what did your unfashionable ass just call me?!
Captain Kracker : I mean, I respect the inner speeches really. 
Captain Pavo : Hey! Don't dodge my introspective question you tomato looking fiend!

Oh, well this is a surprise.
The demeanour and voices of these pirates are not what people typically think when thinking piratey thoughts, or whatever that means.
One of them sounds like they just got back after a long 20 or some years from a farm upstate and the other one sounds like he sucks his own dick too much...
Metaphorically...
Anywho, they seem to be bickering to each other in a childish manner, acting very unpiratey in this very piratey situation.
 
Who's conversation will you listen to first?
(Click one of the boats)

Captain Pavo : Wait nah nah nah nah run that back run that back! What did your horrendous mind just call me?!
Captain Kracker : Captain Twinkle Twink!
Captain Pavo : You foul beast, that's not even my gorgeous name!
Captain Kracker : Well, ya pirate avatar shines brighter than the gah damn sun on a hot Monday aftanoon that'd turn any hog into a firm meaty slab of bacon! And you're a twink, no explanations needed.
Captain Pavo : Wha- Yes explanations are needed?!
Captain Pavo : Have you seen my luxurious build? This is what a REAL and MANLY MAN, who's about to serve some grade A ass whoopin looks like!

Captain Kracker : Really? Cause your excessive use of makeup on that baby doll face of yours sure as hell screams MANLY to me.
Captain Pavo : Hey! My gorgeous face ain't soft! It's firm, tough and beautiful!
Captain Kracker : Ring ring! Hello, kindergarten, yes I’m here to pick up my daughte- I mean my lil baby goo goo ga ga fetus son!
Captain Pavo : Ring ring! Hello, Mister farmer, it would seem that one of your putrid mud snorting hogs escaped their enclosure!
Captain Kracker : Ring ring! Hello, Captain Twinkle Twink, why don’t you go capture this raw chunk of bacon? Unless… you’re not MANLY enough! Because last I checked a pathetic lil baby boi, who spends his whole day on the couch watchin whatever that dumbass SpongeTom Circlepants cartoon for kids is, can’t possibly dream of lifting up anything that’s heavier than a stick!
Captain Pavo : Ummm?! I'll have you know, SpongeTom Circlepants is only the most greatest, most awesome, most MAGNIFICENT cartoon of all time!

Captain Pavo : It's basically a sweet cartoon featuring the titular character SpongeTom Circlepants. Obviously, by the name alone, he's an anthropomorphic sponge that wears a very fashionable pair of circular pants. He works at the well established Krusted Krustacean where lots of silly shenanigans ensue! His neighbour slash coworker, Octopusward, is a grumpy octopus who hates his job at the delightful Krusted Krustacean and he especially has a vile hatred for SpongeTom! So their dynamic is very well juxtaposed and creates loads of comical scenarios for the amazing writers to write off of. We also have his greedy boss, Mr. Karbs, and his idiot but well meaning best friend, Patrick Cucumber. There are lots more intriguing characters and side characters that I could get into, but my absolute favourite characters are SpongeToms parents. They're just the absolute sweetest couple and always care about their beautiful son and never doubt him. It's always so wholesome to watch. Oh, and fun fact, my sweet ol precious grandma was actually the original voice actor for SpongeToms mom! Crazy, I know! Though I just have to say, very cold take, but my favourite episode has got to be episode one. It's just a fantastic way of introducing all the main characters and setting the tone of the whole series. The jokes are knee slapping, the dialogue is seamless, and most importantly is-

Captain Kracker : SHUT UUUUUUUUUUUUP!!!
Captain Pavo : :(

Captain Kracker : Don't ya see Twinkle Twink, the villain's monologue is one of the most iconic moments of any good story with a super villain! The mood, must be ominous. The tension, must be as high as the grasshoppers fly. And the beef beatin steaks must be through the gosh darn barn roof!
Captain Pavo : Yea definitely, explaining your sadly tragic backstory or exposing your master plan to the brave hero whilst they're like, five feet away from you is a very excellent use of your time!
Captain Kracker : It's at least more valuable than spending two thirds of your day puttin on that expensive colourful mud paint thang on your face ain't it?
Captain Pavo : Hey it does not take THAT painfully long to put my exquisite, beautiful, magnificent, gorgeous, extravagant makeup up on-
Captain Kracker : Yea yea yea shut your chicken pen already! The months of plannin it takes to construct a perfectly crafted monologue, that lasts long enough to entice the viewers into the villain's struggles and slash or plan, whilst not lasting too long as to make it boring and slash or monotonous, is the key balance that many villains and slash or antagonists cannot dream to achieve. I, however, just like how I've mastered catching flying unborn chicken fetuses from the air, have gained total mastery over the art of the monologues and-
Captain Kracker : OH WOULD YA TAKE YA GUN POWDER MECHANISM OUTTA YA FEEDIN HOLE!

Captain Kracker : *ahem* Whilst the antagonists' monologues are always far tastier than even the tastiest cow shreds shoved into a wrap of bread in the oven, a hero's monologue is quite an interestin display indeed. I've gotta give credit where due, ya inner speech is quite respectable for however long you've taken to master the craft.
Captain Pavo : If I was really doing an exhausting monologue to my heroic self, how would your depraved mind prove it?!
Captain Kracker : Cause you were starrin at me for like 5 minutes straight.
Captain Pavo : ... Fuck you...

Okay, clearly you two aren't getting anywhere with these half assed insults. You came here for a BATTLE, for WAR! Your mama didn't raise you on the ranch, wrangling sheep and gutting hogs just to be a pussy! No, you OWN the pussy, you EAT the pussy, you DROP KICK THE DAMN PUSSY T'ILL THE NEXT HARVEST! So by god you're going to GET SOME MORHERFUCKIN NON PUSSY ACTION RIGHT NOW!

Okay, after having some very productive conversations with this malicious fiend, he seems to have lost his patience. The first strike has been sent, and you're not about to sit on your feathery, glistening buttocks and take this hit. The time for retaliation is now!
Your moment has finally come to put an end to this beast's tyranny once and for all! But what to do?

You could maybe fire a canon shot back at him. Eye for an eye kind of thing! But little does he know, you have a super duper secret technique.
What is this super giga ultra deluxe edition strategy called you may ask? Well it's called... “not knowing how to use a cannon”...
So maybe you can do something else haha.

You could maybe swing over to his ship and get into the ol' ruff n tumble with the Captain himself. Yea yea, that's what your intellectual brain will do! You'll swing your mighty sword right in between his maroonish head and putrid body to slice his cranium clean off from the rest of his horrid build-
Oh wait no, that's what HE'S going to do to you... uh... shit maybe you should do something else.

You could tactically retreat for cover under your trusty and reliable fruit basket! They've never done you wrong in the past and they are an excellent source of all sorts of healthy vitamins! Surely the whimsical John the Banana and the fierce Rose the Grape will help you take 120 pounds of tightly compressed steel charging towards you at 1000 kilometres per hour to the face... right?
After thinking about your plentiful options for around 2 seconds, you decide that you'll take this demon down byyyyyyy...
RAMMING YOUR ludicrously EXPENSIVE BOAT STRAIGHT INTO HIS!!!
Captain Kracker : Oh wow, your really that crazy?!
Captain Kracker : Heh well, challenge accepted!

DAMNIT!
You forgot to charge your beautiful vr headset last night!
Now that dirty pig thinks you've pussied out of that fierce and ferocious combat situation in VrTalk!

That sucks!
Guess you'll plug in your headset to charge. So while that's happening, you might as well start your daily routine!
Your name is Nyle Pavo, and you just spent the first 30 minutes of your day being a very responsible man by beefing with some farmer guy with a super villain complex on a virtual reality chatting game. Very productive indeed!
You won't let that get you down though, for today is a big day. You have been working tirelessly on something big, something Huge, something GINORMOUS for the past 3 months that may or may not come to fruition today!
But that's going to have to wait. You're a guy, nay, a full grown MAN who's got a lot of responsibilities on his shoulders.

You have a handy dandy list of responsible responsibilities to do.
You don't think you've said responsibility enough.
Let's see. You did in fact wake up today so that's checked. Now you must appease your hunger.

Buuuuut before you do that. You have an unreasonable urge to walk around your lively living space to check out all of the various things you own.
Let's have a looksy.

Ah yes, your sleeping courters. After a long gruelling day of doing very manly things such as, but not limited to,
Waking up.
It's nice to just collapse into the loving arms of your bedsheets. But if your loving bedsheet actually had loving arms you think you'd rather just die of sleep deprivation.

But what kind of man would you be if you didn't make your comfortable bed look presentable to any guests that might try breaking into your room.
Because god knows you'd let ANYBODY in your safe space!

Alright, just have to put this side here, and fold this... and fold that... and... and knot this... wait, do you have to make a knot?
Uuuuuuuh...

Uuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuhhhhh.............
Nevermind...

Standing before you is your great, almighty, PRISTINE late 20th early 21th century cartoon dvd collection! You love collecting dvd's for these old cartoons like the Flint and Steel Stones or the Carpetrats. But you especially enjoy the show SpongeTom Circlepants.
They have this certain comical and whimsical energy to them that you can't help but adore.
However, you can't seem to stop staring at that ugly and horrendous hole in the middle of your circular discs in a box collection!
This annoying empty space is supposed to be filled with the damn dvd for the glorious 1st season of SpongeTom Circlepants! But you can't seem to find it anywhere, it's just too rare...

Is what you would say if you hadn't found this kind seller who sold this priceless artifact to you for a measly $5000 (Which is totally not worth all of your life savings)
And it just so happens that the package arrives today!
Goodbye annoying gaping hole, nobody will miss you!

Would you look at that, records upon records upon records upon records.
You have built up an impressive collection of vinyl records that stack up all the way to your nipples during the past few years. But unlike your excellent collection of cartoons, all of these babies belong to a single, spectacular artist called Cristal La Voix!

She's got the voice of an angelicaly angelic angel, who just ate a bunch of helium balloons, or drank them, breathed them? You don't know how to refer to someone consuming a bunch of helium. All of her songs are filled to the brim with bombastic energy that's just so, SO addictive! But not only that, she's one hell of an actor too. She's been in lots of musical plays and cartoons and shows and this and that and she's got it all. You wish to become as talented as her one day!
Unfortunately, you don't have anything to play her songs on so you mostly just listen to them on U-Tube.

Speak of the devil. Someone just subscribed to your lovely U-Tube channel!
YIPPEE!
You like posting videos of you and your friends goofing off in all sorts of games like VrTalk or Craftmine. But now, this will be the hosting platform for your ginormous, HUMUNGUS project!

After spending more of your valuable time snooping around the place you've lived in for your whole life, you must get on your way to the kitchen!
You take great pride in knowing that you are now an independent and handsomely devilish looking adult.
Heck, even your parents trust you enough to go on a month long filming shoot, entrusting you to not burn the house down and, as they say, “Get a damn job.”
But you're way too busy to be- wait hold on. 
Damn look at yourself, now this is what the peak male physic looks like! You just gotta strike a few fabulous poses for this mirror, it's the least you could do.

Oh no!
G- Grandma... oh no, oh god.
OH FUCK

That was your grandma's favourite dusty vase! The dustiest vase in the house! And now the dust is all over the floor!
Oh you just feel horrible!
You're going to have to tell her the bad news, hopefully she can forgive you.

Seems like you're going to visit her later today, maybe you can bring an apology gift.
Sorry grandma sorry grandma sorry grandma :((( 
But now what to do about this dirty dusty mess?
Alright enough dillidallying, it's time for this manly man to make some delicious man breakfast and get this day rolling!

Ah yes, morning wouldn't be morning if not for an energetic drink.
After becoming a mature man, you have gained the uncontrollable adult urge to drink a nice warm toasty cup of cof-
YUUUUCK!!!

God that taste was horrible!
Guess you're too manly for such a mundane drink like a bunch of brown disgusting energy beans being mushed together into a concoction.
Looks like you'll be having the greatest beverage of all time...
FRUIT JUICE :DDD

Fruit bowls here, fruit bowls there, fruit bowls EVERYWHERE!
Not that you mind having, essentially, unlimited access to a variety of delectable sugary delicacies. You love fruit!

It just gets somewhat annoying when your lovely mother leaves them in the most random of places all around the house.
To do what you may ask? Well obviously she lets them rot and then consume them with a bendy straw like juice.
What, your mom doesn't do that too? Weird...
Clearly, you own a toaster.

Appetizers over! It is now time for the main dish.
You look inside of your fridge to see if there's anything to eat.
Hey look, there's still some leftover cake from the birthday party last week!

BUT NO, in order to prove your maturity, you cannot simply just surrender your soul to dine on some simple and easy to consume treat. You must reach the highest levels of cooking to prove to your mom and dad that you are no slouch in the kitchen. You must make some delicious, mouth watering, thirst quenching scrambled eggs!
You forgot you can't cook.

Alright, breakfast is done!
Now it's time for your second favourite part of your daily routine.
Making yourself look extra stylish!

You absolutely love prettying yourself up every day.
Some people might call it unmanly or even, excuse your language, GIRLY for a distinguished gentleman such as yourself to be using such excessive amounts of makeup. But to that you say, isn't a man supposed to challenge social standards?
Doesn't being a man mean you don't give a rats ass about what anyone thinks?!
Because nothing screams being a MAN more than looking society in the eye and yelling that you're TOO MANLY TO EVEN FOLLOW GENDER RULES!
Or maybe you just like wearing makeup. Who knows really.
You open your closet and check out what there is to wear

Wow, so many fashionable choices.
The amount of choices are starting to hurt your head!
You've got a midnight black sweater, a sable black sweater, a coal black sweater...
Hmmm, you think you'll weeeeeaaaar...
Your midnight black SWEATER!!!
Your sable black SWEATER!!!
Your coal black SWEATER!!!
Your oil black SWEATER!!!
Your ebony black SWEATER!!!
Your onyx black SWEATER!!!
Your void black SWEATER!!!
Your ink black SWEATER!!!
Your panther black SWEATER!!!

And that's another very difficult responsibility done.
Now, there's only one last thing to do- wait, is that a fly?

Look at it, what a foul creature.
They're smelly, weird and god knows why they rub their hands as they do. Where is it going though?

Dear god, it's headed straight towards your most prized possession.
Your Uculus VR Headset!
You must swat this beast IMMEDIATELY!

HIT THE FLY
<-----
Don't swat yourself dumbass!
SWATTED

Shhhh baby, it's okay it's okay.
This virtual device is your life, it's your soul. Without it, you wouldn't be able to work on your GINORMOUS project!
If your headset ever got taken away from you, you might just start melting uncontrollably.

But now that that's dealt with, it's finally time to complete your last responsibility...
Spending 3 hours of your morning doing nothing but watching cartoons :D
And today is Coward the Courageous Dog season 2 day!

You take out the dvd, you open your pc, and insert the dvd into the disc reader and open up-
Well well well, there's only ever one person who immediately messages you the second you open your pc.
Guess you have time to chat for a bit.

Ok, this may be a setback.
Alex plays a key role in your project. He's the life and blood of the whole operation.
He's the damn camera man!
Why is this a problem? Because his ass needs at least like 15 hours of sleep a day to properly function. Or else he just flops onto the floor and snores for the rest of the week!
Out of all the times to pull an all nighter, why is it today! How are we supposed to record our show if the camera man is too sleepy to record us acting of the recording acting act camera... ACT ACT!

It’s ok it’s ok, nothing to worry about.
You know that Alex suffers from the deadly condition of OCD and there’s nothing he can do about it. We’ll just record tomorrow.
